Description: switch to shrink valcap and related conditioning sets post-solve
Max number of times to iterate on a given solve year to achieve GSw_PRM_StressThreshold when using stress periods (0 means don't iterate; 1 means 1 extra ReEDS run; etc)

Geothermal cost setting (inputs\plant_characteristics\{plantchar_geo}.csv).The options for plantchar_geo start with 'geo_' and the switch should be set to the entire file name (ex: geo_ATB_2023_conservative)
Geothermal can be turned off [0], left to the default representation [1], or have an extended representation [2]
CO2/CO2e emission cap. Turn off cap (0) or turn on CO2 only cap (1) or turn on CO2e cap (2) or include H2 leakage in CO2e cap (3)
Scenario for CO2 cap pathway (see inputs\emission_constraints\co2_cap.csv)
